content.json:
## Threat Operations Dashboard No MDE/MDI
A single pane of glass for threat detection and response across host, identity, network, and cloud. Powered by native incident correlation, UEBA (User and Entity Behavior Analytics), ML anomalies, and Microsoft Defender Threat Intelligence (MDTI). Use the **Time Range** picker and the **tabs** below to pivot between the Overview, Host, Identity, Network, Cloud, and Sign-in Geography threat views.

Whole environment threat posture in one view. Headline counts blend incidents, analytics alerts, UEBA risk, ML anomalies, and MDTI. The ATT&CK chart fuses analytic alerts with UEBA/ML anomaly tactics so leadership sees adversary behavior, not just log volume.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
  (SecurityIncident | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, Status) by IncidentNumber | where Status != "Closed" | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Open Incidents", Sort = 1),
  (SecurityAlert | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where AlertSeverity in ("High","Critical") | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "High/Critical Alerts", Sort = 2),
  (BehaviorAnalytics | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where InvestigationPriority > 0 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "UEBA Risk Activities", Sort = 3),
  (Anomalies | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "ML Anomalies", Sort = 4),
  (ThreatIntelIndicators | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Threat Intel Indicators", Sort = 5),
  (AADRiskyUsers | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = dcount(UserPrincipalName) | extend Metric = "Risky Users", Sort = 6)
| project Metric, Value, Sort
| sort by Sort asc
content.title: Threat Posture at a Glance

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_min(TimeGenerated, Severity) by IncidentNumber
| summarize Incidents = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Severity
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Incidents Created Over Time (by Severity)
Alert Severity Mix

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
  (SecurityAlert | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(Tactics) | extend T = split(Tactics, ",")),
  (Anomalies | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(Tactics) | extend T = split(Tactics, ";"))
| mv-expand Tactic = T to typeof(string)
| extend Tactic = trim(@"\s+", Tactic)
| where isnotempty(Tactic)
| summarize Detections = count() by Tactic
| sort by Detections desc
content.title: MITRE ATT&CK Tactics Observed (Alerts + UEBA/ML Anomalies)

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Alerts = count(), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by AlertName, ProductName, AlertSeverity
| top 20 by Alerts desc
content.title: Top Detections Firing

content.json: Threat activity from Windows servers and workstations onboarded to Azure Arc with the Azure Monitor Agent (AMA), streamed through the **Windows Security Events via AMA** connector only. No Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, no Defender for Identity, no Linux. Every pane below is built purely on the **SecurityEvent** table and is organised around what a threat actor actually does on a host: gain access with credentials, run tooling, move laterally, escalate privilege, establish persistence, and tamper with logging to evade detection. The Adversary Tactics chart maps raw Windows Event IDs to MITRE ATT&CK tactics so you read attacker behaviour, not just log volume.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
  (SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = dcount(Computer) | extend Metric = 'Windows Hosts Logging', Sort = 1),
  (SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where EventID == 4625 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Failed Logons (4625)', Sort = 2),
  (SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where EventID == 4672 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Privileged Logons (4672)', Sort = 3),
  (SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where EventID == 4648 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Explicit Cred Use (4648)', Sort = 4),
  (SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where EventID == 4769 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Kerberos Tickets (4769)', Sort = 5),
  (SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where EventID == 4688 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Process Creations (4688)', Sort = 6)
| project Metric, Value, Sort
| sort by Sort asc
content.title: Host Threat Snapshot (Windows Security Events via AMA)

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventID in (4625, 4771, 4776, 4648, 4769, 4768, 4698, 4699, 4702, 4697, 7045, 4720, 4722, 4724, 4728, 4732, 4756, 1102, 4719, 4688, 4798)
| extend Tactic = case(
    EventID in (4625, 4771, 4776), 'Credential Access',
    EventID in (4648, 4769, 4768), 'Lateral Movement',
    EventID in (4698, 4699, 4702, 4697, 7045, 4720, 4722, 4724, 4728, 4732, 4756), 'Persistence',
    EventID in (1102, 4719), 'Defense Evasion',
    EventID == 4688, 'Execution',
    EventID == 4798, 'Discovery',
    'Other')
| summarize Events = count() by Tactic
| sort by Events desc
content.title: Adversary Tactics Observed (Windows Event IDs Mapped to MITRE ATT&CK)

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventID in (4624, 4625)
| summarize SuccessfulLogons = countif(EventID == 4624), FailedLogons = countif(EventID == 4625) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Logon Activity Trend - Success vs Failed (Brute Force / Spray Signal)

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventID == 4624
| extend LogonTypeName = case(
    LogonType == 2, '2 Interactive',
    LogonType == 3, '3 Network',
    LogonType == 4, '4 Batch',
    LogonType == 5, '5 Service',
    LogonType == 7, '7 Unlock',
    LogonType == 8, '8 NetworkCleartext',
    LogonType == 9, '9 NewCredentials (RunAs)',
    LogonType == 10, '10 RemoteInteractive (RDP)',
    LogonType == 11, '11 CachedInteractive',
    strcat('Type ', tostring(LogonType)))
| summarize Count = count() by LogonTypeName
| sort by Count desc
content.title: Logon Type Distribution (Network & RDP = Lateral Movement Surface)

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventID == 4672
| summarize PrivilegedLogons = count(), Accounts = dcount(SubjectUserName), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| top 15 by PrivilegedLogons desc
content.title: Top Hosts by Privileged Logon (4672) Admin Rights Asserted

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventID == 4672
| where SubjectUserName !endswith '$'
| summarize PrivilegedLogons = count(), Hosts = dcount(Computer), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Account = SubjectUserName
| top 20 by PrivilegedLogons desc
content.title: Accounts Using Privileged Logon Rights (4672) Privilege Escalation Watch

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventID == 4648
| summarize Uses = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName), TargetAccounts = make_set(TargetUserName, 10), Hosts = dcount(Computer), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by SourceAccount = SubjectUserName
| top 20 by Uses desc
content.title: Explicit Credential Use (4648) RunAs / Pass-the-Hash / Lateral Movement

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventID == 4769
| where ServiceName != 'krbtgt'
| summarize Requests = count(), Services = dcount(ServiceName), ServicesRequested = make_set(ServiceName, 10), Hosts = dcount(Computer), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Account = TargetAccount
| top 20 by Requests desc
content.title: Kerberos Service Ticket Requests (4769) Kerberoasting Hunt

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventID == 4688
| extend Proc = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| extend Parent = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where isnotempty(Proc)
| summarize Executions = count(), Hosts = dcount(Computer), Accounts = dcount(SubjectUserName), ParentProcesses = dcount(Parent), TopParent = arg_max(TimeGenerated, Parent).Parent, FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Proc
| top 25 by Executions desc
content.title: Process Creation Inventory (4688) Hunt for the Unusual

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventID == 4688
| extend Proc = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where Proc in ('powershell.exe', 'pwsh.exe', 'cmd.exe', 'wmic.exe', 'rundll32.exe', 'mshta.exe', 'regsvr32.exe', 'certutil.exe', 'bitsadmin.exe', 'cscript.exe', 'wscript.exe', 'psexec.exe', 'net.exe', 'net1.exe', 'schtasks.exe', 'sc.exe', 'reg.exe', 'vssadmin.exe', 'wevtutil.exe', 'whoami.exe', 'nltest.exe')
| extend Parent = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| summarize Executions = count(), Hosts = dcount(Computer), Accounts = dcount(SubjectUserName), Parents = make_set(Parent, 8), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Proc
| sort by Executions desc
content.title: LOLBin & Dual-Use Tool Execution (4688) Living-off-the-Land Tradecraft

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventID in (4720, 4722, 4724, 4726, 4738, 4728, 4732, 4756, 4740, 1102, 4719, 4698, 4699, 4702, 4697, 7045)
| extend Activity = case(
    EventID == 4720, 'Account Created',
    EventID == 4722, 'Account Enabled',
    EventID == 4724, 'Password Reset Attempt',
    EventID == 4726, 'Account Deleted',
    EventID == 4738, 'Account Changed',
    EventID == 4728, 'Added to Global Security Group',
    EventID == 4732, 'Added to Local Security Group',
    EventID == 4756, 'Added to Universal Security Group',
    EventID == 4740, 'Account Lockout',
    EventID == 1102, 'Audit Log Cleared',
    EventID == 4719, 'Audit Policy Changed',
    EventID == 4698, 'Scheduled Task Created',
    EventID == 4699, 'Scheduled Task Deleted',
    EventID == 4702, 'Scheduled Task Updated',
    EventID == 4697, 'Service Installed',
    EventID == 7045, 'Service Installed (SCM)',
    strcat('Event ', tostring(EventID)))
| summarize Count = count(), Hosts = dcount(Computer), Accounts = dcount(SubjectUserName), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Activity, EventID
| sort by Count desc
content.title: Security Sensitive Events - Persistence, PrivEsc & Defense Evasion

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventID == 4798
| summarize Enumerations = count(), TargetAccounts = dcount(TargetAccount), Hosts = dcount(Computer), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Actor = SubjectUserName
| top 20 by Enumerations desc
content.title: Local Group Membership Enumeration (4798) Discovery / Recon

content.json: Identity is the new perimeter. This view leads with Sentinel UEBA: the InvestigationPriority score ranks users by anomalous behavior, fused with Entra ID Identity Protection risk and sign in telemetry across interactive, non interactive, and service principal flows.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
  (AADRiskyUsers | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = dcount(UserPrincipalName) | extend Metric = "Risky Users", Sort = 1),
  (AADUserRiskEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Risk Detections", Sort = 2),
  (BehaviorAnalytics | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where InvestigationPriority > 0 | summarize Value = dcount(UserPrincipalName) | extend Metric = "UEBA Flagged Users", Sort = 3),
  (SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ResultType != 0 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Failed Sign ins", Sort = 4),
  (AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ResultType != 0 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Failed SP Sign ins", Sort = 5)
| project Metric, Value, Sort
| sort by Sort asc
content.title: Identity Risk Snapshot

content.query:
BehaviorAnalytics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where InvestigationPriority > 0
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| summarize PriorityScore = sum(InvestigationPriority), Activities = count(), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName
| top 25 by PriorityScore desc
content.title: UEBA Users by Investigation Priority

content.query:
BehaviorAnalytics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where InvestigationPriority > 0
| summarize Count = count() by ActivityType
| where isnotempty(ActivityType)
| sort by Count desc
content.title: UEBA Anomalous Activity Types

content.query:
AADUserRiskEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), RiskEventType
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Identity Protection Risk Detections Over Time

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize Count = count() by ResultDescription
| where isnotempty(ResultDescription)
| top 10 by Count desc
content.title: Top Sign in Failure Reasons

content.query:
AADRiskyUsers
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, RiskLevel, RiskState, RiskDetail) by UserPrincipalName
| project UserPrincipalName, RiskLevel, RiskState, RiskDetail, LastUpdated = TimeGenerated
| order by LastUpdated desc
content.title: Risky Users Current State

content.json:
### Entra ID Identity Protection
The full Identity Protection picture the ICAM team and CISO track: live risk detections, the risky user population by risk level, and the daily inflow of newly flagged users. Risk detection types such as Unfamiliar sign in properties, Anomalous token, Malicious IP, and Anonymous IP map directly to credential theft, token replay, and infrastructure abuse. Every row is a candidate for Conditional Access enforcement and SOC follow up.

content.query:
AADRiskyUsers
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, RiskLevel, RiskState) by UserPrincipalName
| where RiskState in ("atRisk","confirmedCompromised")
| extend RiskLevel = case(isempty(RiskLevel) or RiskLevel == "none", "unspecified", RiskLevel)
| summarize Users = count() by RiskLevel
| sort by Users desc
content.title: Risky Users by Risk Level

content.query:
AADRiskyUsers
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where RiskState in ("atRisk","confirmedCompromised")
| summarize arg_min(TimeGenerated, RiskLevel) by UserPrincipalName
| summarize NewRiskyUsers = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: New Risky Users per Day

content.query:
AADUserRiskEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(RiskEventType)
| summarize Detections = count() by RiskEventType
| sort by Detections desc
content.title: Risk Detection Types

content.query:
AADUserRiskEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend City = tostring(Location.city), State = tostring(Location.state), Country = tostring(Location.countryOrRegion)
| extend Place = strcat(City, iff(isnotempty(State), strcat(", ", State), ""), iff(isnotempty(Country), strcat(", ", Country), ""))
| project DetectedDateTime, User = UserPrincipalName, IpAddress, Location = Place, DetectionType = RiskEventType, Timing = DetectionTimingType, RiskLevel, RiskState, Source
| order by DetectedDateTime desc
content.title: Risk Detections Feed (Live from Entra ID Protection)

content.query:
AADUserRiskEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Country = tostring(Location.countryOrRegion)
| where isnotempty(Country)
| summarize Detections = count(), Users = dcount(UserPrincipalName), HighRisk = countif(RiskLevel == "high"), Compromised = countif(RiskState == "confirmedCompromised"), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Country
| sort by Detections desc
content.title: Risk Detections by Country

content.query:
AADUserRiskEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(IpAddress)
| extend Country = tostring(Location.countryOrRegion)
| summarize Detections = count(), Users = dcount(UserPrincipalName), DetectionTypes = make_set(RiskEventType, 8), HighRisk = countif(RiskLevel == "high"), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by IpAddress, Country
| top 25 by Detections desc
content.title: Top Risk Source IPs

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("low","medium","high") or RiskState in ("atRisk","confirmedCompromised")
| extend City = tostring(LocationDetails.city), Country = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
| extend Place = strcat(City, iff(isnotempty(Country), strcat(", ", Country), ""))
| project TimeGenerated, User = UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Location = Place, App = AppDisplayName, RiskLevel = RiskLevelDuringSignIn, RiskState, Result = ResultType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Risky Sign ins

content.json: Microsoft Defender Threat Intelligence and network telemetry in one view. The top rows quantify the live MDTI and open-source indicator feed flowing into Sentinel; the catalog charts profile that intelligence by type, provider, confidence, threat family, and freshness. The correlation grids then match those indicators against every IP, domain, URL, and file hash your tenant actually logged, while the Graph API, Syslog, and sign-in panels expose the on-network and programmatic activity an adversary would generate. This is the cross source correlation a legacy SIEM could not do natively.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
  (ThreatIntelIndicators | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "TI Indicators", Sort = 1),
  (ThreatIntelIndicators | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where IsActive == true | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Active Indicators", Sort = 2),
  (ThreatIntelIndicators | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ObservableKey has "ipv4-addr" | summarize Value = dcount(ObservableValue) | extend Metric = "Malicious IPs Tracked", Sort = 3),
  (ThreatIntelIndicators | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ObservableKey has "domain-name" | summarize Value = dcount(ObservableValue) | extend Metric = "Malicious Domains Tracked", Sort = 4),
  (ThreatIntelIndicators | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ObservableKey has "url" | summarize Value = dcount(ObservableValue) | extend Metric = "Malicious URLs Tracked", Sort = 5),
  (ThreatIntelIndicators | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ObservableKey has "file:hashes" | summarize Value = dcount(ObservableValue) | extend Metric = "Malicious File Hashes", Sort = 6)
| project Metric, Value, Sort
| sort by Sort asc
content.title: Threat Intelligence Coverage

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
  (MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Graph API Calls", Sort = 1),
  (MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ResponseStatusCode >= 400 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Graph API Errors", Sort = 2),
  (MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = dcount(tostring(IPAddress)) | extend Metric = "Graph Source IPs", Sort = 3),
  (AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Non-Interactive Sign-ins", Sort = 4),
  (Syslog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Network Syslog Events", Sort = 5)
| project Metric, Value, Sort
| sort by Sort asc
content.title: Network & API Telemetry

content.json:
### Threat Intelligence Catalog
The live MDTI and open-source indicator feed flowing into Sentinel, profiled by indicator type, provider, confidence, threat family, and freshness. This is the raw intelligence the correlation grids further down match your telemetry against.

content.query:
ThreatIntelIndicators
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend IndicatorType = tostring(split(ObservableKey, ":")[0])
| where isnotempty(IndicatorType)
| summarize Indicators = count() by IndicatorType
| sort by Indicators desc
content.title: Indicators by Type

content.query:
ThreatIntelIndicators
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsActive == true
| summarize Indicators = count() by Provider = SourceSystem
| top 12 by Indicators desc
content.title: Indicators by Provider / Feed

content.query:
ThreatIntelIndicators
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsActive == true
| extend Band = case(Confidence >= 90, "90-100 Very High", Confidence >= 70, "70-89 High", Confidence >= 50, "50-69 Medium", Confidence >= 1, "1-49 Low", "0 Unscored")
| summarize Indicators = count() by Band
| order by Band asc
content.title: Indicators by Confidence
Active vs Revoked

content.query:
ThreatIntelIndicators
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsActive == true and isnotempty(Tags)
| mv-expand Tag = split(Tags, ",") to typeof(string)
| extend Tag = trim(" ", tostring(Tag))
| where Tag !startswith "p:" and Tag !startswith "ic:" and Tag !startswith "vic:" and Tag !startswith "gid:" and Tag !startswith "cid:" and Tag !startswith "ultime" and isnotempty(Tag)
| summarize Indicators = count() by ThreatTag = Tag
| top 15 by Indicators desc
content.title: Top Threat Family Tags

content.query:
ThreatIntelIndicators
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsActive == true
| summarize NewIndicators = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Indicator Freshness (Ingested Over Time)

content.json:
### MDTI Correlation Against Tenant Telemetry
The grids below correlate live threat-intel IP indicators against every IP your tenant logged across Entra sign-ins, non-interactive sign-ins, Graph API, the Azure control plane, and Office 365. An empty result is the healthy outcome: it means no currently tracked malicious IP has touched your environment in the selected window. Any row that appears is a confirmed brush with known-bad infrastructure and should be triaged immediately.

content.query:
let tiIps = ThreatIntelIndicators
  | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
  | where ObservableKey has "ipv4-addr"
  | distinct ObservableValue;
union isfuzzy=true
  (SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = IPAddress, Source = "Entra Sign in", Actor = UserPrincipalName, TimeGenerated),
  (AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = IPAddress, Source = "Non Interactive Sign in", Actor = UserPrincipalName, TimeGenerated),
  (MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = tostring(IPAddress), Source = "Graph API", Actor = tostring(UserId), TimeGenerated),
  (AzureActivity | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = CallerIpAddress, Source = "Azure Control Plane", Actor = Caller, TimeGenerated),
  (OfficeActivity | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = tostring(extract(@"(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)", 1, ClientIP)), Source = "Office 365", Actor = UserId, TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(IP) and IP in (tiIps)
| summarize Matches = count(), Sources = make_set(Source, 6), Actors = make_set(Actor, 10), DistinctActors = dcount(Actor), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by IP
| sort by Matches desc
content.title: MDTI Match Known Bad IPs Across All Tenant Logs

content.query:
let tiIps = ThreatIntelIndicators
  | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
  | where ObservableKey has "ipv4-addr"
  | distinct ObservableValue;
union isfuzzy=true
  (SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = IPAddress, Source = "Entra Sign in"),
  (AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = IPAddress, Source = "Non Interactive Sign in"),
  (MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = tostring(IPAddress), Source = "Graph API"),
  (AzureActivity | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = CallerIpAddress, Source = "Azure Control Plane"),
  (OfficeActivity | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = tostring(extract(@"(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)", 1, ClientIP)), Source = "Office 365")
| where isnotempty(IP) and IP in (tiIps)
| summarize Matches = count(), DistinctBadIPs = dcount(IP) by Source
| sort by Matches desc
content.title: MDTI Matches by Log Source

content.query:
let tiIps = ThreatIntelIndicators
  | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
  | where ObservableKey has "ipv4-addr"
  | distinct ObservableValue;
union isfuzzy=true
  (SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = IPAddress, Source = "Entra Sign in", TimeGenerated),
  (AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = IPAddress, Source = "Non Interactive Sign in", TimeGenerated),
  (MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = tostring(IPAddress), Source = "Graph API", TimeGenerated),
  (AzureActivity | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = CallerIpAddress, Source = "Azure Control Plane", TimeGenerated),
  (OfficeActivity | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project IP = tostring(extract(@"(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)", 1, ClientIP)), Source = "Office 365", TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(IP) and IP in (tiIps)
| summarize Hits = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Source
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: MDTI Hits Over Time (Known Bad IPs Touching the Tenant)

content.json:
### Microsoft Graph API & Network Telemetry
Graph API is the primary programmatic surface into your tenant. Volume and error trends, status-code mix, source IPs, calling applications, and user agents expose anomalous automation, token abuse, and reconnaissance. Linux Syslog volume by facility rounds out the on-network picture.

content.query:
MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Calls = count(), Errors = countif(ResponseStatusCode >= 400) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Graph API Call Volume & Errors Over Time

content.query:
MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Calls = count() by StatusClass = strcat(substring(tostring(ResponseStatusCode), 0, 1), "xx")
| order by StatusClass asc
content.title: Graph API Status Class Mix

content.query:
MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResponseStatusCode >= 400
| summarize Errors = count() by ResponseStatusCode
| sort by Errors desc
content.title: Graph API Errors by Status Code (4xx/5xx)

content.query:
MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(UserAgent)
| summarize Calls = count() by UserAgent
| top 15 by Calls desc
content.title: Top Graph API User Agents

content.query:
MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Calls = count(), Errors = countif(ResponseStatusCode >= 400), Apps = dcount(AppId), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by SourceIP = tostring(IPAddress)
| top 25 by Calls desc
content.title: Top Graph API Source IPs

content.query:
MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Calls = count(), Errors = countif(ResponseStatusCode >= 400), SourceIPs = dcount(tostring(IPAddress)), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Application = tostring(AppId)
| top 25 by Calls desc
content.title: Top Graph API Calling Applications

content.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Facility
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Linux Syslog Volume by Facility

content.json:
### Sign-in Network Footprint
The network reach of identities: non-interactive sign-in source IPs (token refreshes and service flows that attackers abuse for stealth) and the per-user spread of distinct IPs and countries that flags account sharing, proxy abuse, and impossible-travel.

content.query:
AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize SignIns = count(), Users = dcount(UserPrincipalName), Failures = countif(ResultType != 0), Apps = dcount(AppDisplayName), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by SourceIP = IPAddress
| top 25 by SignIns desc
content.title: Top Non-Interactive Sign-in Source IPs

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Country = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
| summarize SignIns = count(), DistinctIPs = dcount(IPAddress), Countries = dcount(Country), Failures = countif(ResultType != 0), Apps = dcount(AppDisplayName), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by User = UserPrincipalName
| top 25 by DistinctIPs desc
content.title: Per-User IP & Country Spread

content.json:
### MDTI Indicator Matches in M365
Beyond IPs, MDTI tracks malicious **domains, URLs, and file hashes**. The grids below correlate those indicators against your Microsoft 365 estate, weaponized URLs landing in mail and SharePoint/OneDrive/Teams, and known-bad file hashes arriving as email attachments. A hit here is a confirmed brush with adversary infrastructure or tooling.

content.query:
let tiDomains = ThreatIntelIndicators
  | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
  | where ObservableKey has "domain-name"
  | distinct Indicator = tolower(tostring(ObservableValue));
let tiUrls = ThreatIntelIndicators
  | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
  | where ObservableKey has "url"
  | distinct Indicator = tolower(tostring(ObservableValue));
union isfuzzy=true
  (EmailUrlInfo | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | extend Url = tolower(tostring(Url)), Domain = tolower(tostring(UrlDomain)) | project Url, Domain, Source = "Email URL", TimeGenerated),
  (OfficeActivity | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(ObjectId) | extend Url = tolower(tostring(ObjectId)) | extend Domain = tolower(extract(@"https?://([^/:]+)", 1, Url)) | project Url, Domain, Source = "Office 365 (SP/OneDrive/Teams)", TimeGenerated)
| where (isnotempty(Domain) and Domain in (tiDomains)) or (isnotempty(Url) and Url in (tiUrls))
| extend Indicator = iff(Domain in (tiDomains), Domain, Url), IndicatorType = iff(Domain in (tiDomains), "Domain", "URL")
| summarize Hits = count(), Sources = make_set(Source, 4), Example = any(Url), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Indicator, IndicatorType
| sort by Hits desc
content.title: MDTI Match - Malicious Domains & URLs in M365

content.query:
let tiFiles = ThreatIntelIndicators
  | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
  | where ObservableKey has "file:hashes"
  | distinct Hash = tolower(tostring(ObservableValue));
union isfuzzy=true
  (EmailAttachmentInfo | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | extend Hash = tolower(tostring(SHA256)) | project Hash, FileName, FileType, Source = "Email Attachment", Actor = SenderFromAddress, TimeGenerated),
  (EmailAttachmentInfo | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | extend Hash = tolower(tostring(SHA1)) | project Hash, FileName, FileType, Source = "Email Attachment", Actor = SenderFromAddress, TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Hash) and Hash in (tiFiles)
| summarize Hits = count(), Files = make_set(FileName, 8), FileTypes = make_set(FileType, 8), Senders = make_set(Actor, 8), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Hash
| sort by Hits desc
content.title: MDTI Match - Malicious File Hashes Delivered to M365

content.json: Threat activity across Microsoft 365, Azure control plane, and Entra ID. Risky mailbox operations and inbox rules are classic business email compromise (BEC) tradecraft; Azure control plane changes and Entra audit events catch privilege abuse and persistence.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
  (OfficeActivity | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where Operation in ("New-InboxRule","Set-InboxRule","UpdateInboxRules","Add-MailboxPermission") | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Risky Mailbox/Rule Ops", Sort = 1),
  (AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName has "Consent to application" | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "App Consent Grants", Sort = 2),
  (AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName has "Add member to role" | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Privileged Role Adds", Sort = 3),
  (AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName has "conditional access" | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Conditional Access Changes", Sort = 4),
  (AzureActivity | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ActivityStatusValue in ("Failed","Failure") | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Failed Azure Ops", Sort = 5)
| project Metric, Value, Sort
| sort by Sort asc
content.title: Cloud Threat Signals

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
  (OfficeActivity | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where Operation in ("New-InboxRule","Set-InboxRule","UpdateInboxRules","Add-MailboxPermission") | extend Category = "Mailbox/Rule Ops"),
  (AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName has "Consent to application" | extend Category = "App Consent"),
  (AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName has "Add member to role" | extend Category = "Privileged Role Add")
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Category
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Cloud Threat Signals Over Time

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActivityStatusValue in ("Failed","Failure")
| extend Op = tostring(split(OperationNameValue, "/")[-2])
| summarize Count = count() by OperationNameValue
| top 15 by Count desc
content.title: Failed Azure Control Plane Operations

content.query:
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Operation in ("New-InboxRule","Set-InboxRule","Add-MailboxPermission","Set-Mailbox","UpdateInboxRules")
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, Operation, ClientIP, OfficeWorkload
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Risky Mailbox and Inbox Rule Operations (BEC Tradecraft)

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName has_any ("Add member to role","Add eligible member to role","Consent to application","Add app role assignment","Update conditional access policy","Add service principal","Reset password","Certificates and secrets management","Disable Strong Authentication")
| summarize Count = count(), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by OperationName, Result
| top 25 by Count desc
content.title: Sensitive Entra ID Operations (Privilege Abuse & Persistence)

content.json:
### Email Security (Microsoft Defender for Office 365)
Mail-borne threats across the full MDO telemetry set: EmailEvents (verdicts and delivery), EmailUrlInfo (weaponized URLs), EmailAttachmentInfo (malicious files and hashes), EmailPostDeliveryEvents (ZAP remediation), and UrlClickEvents (Safe Links clicks). The tiles, trends and grids below surface what was blocked versus delivered, the senders and domains behind it, the URLs and attachments embedded in mail, and post-delivery clean-up, classic initial-access and credential-harvesting tradecraft the SOC must triage fast.

> Note: this workbook reads the Log Analytics / Sentinel workspace. The richest threat verdicts (ThreatTypes, DetectionMethods) populate fully when opened in the unified Microsoft Defender portal; here the panels are built to also light up from delivery action, quarantine location, bulk-complaint level, and the always-populated URL, attachment, ZAP and click tables.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
  (EmailEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ThreatTypes has "Malware" | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Malware", Sort = 1),
  (EmailEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ThreatTypes has "Phish" | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Phishing", Sort = 2),
  (EmailEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ThreatTypes has "Spam" or BulkComplaintLevel >= 7 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Spam / Bulk", Sort = 3),
  (EmailEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeliveryAction in ("Blocked","Replaced") or DeliveryLocation in ("Quarantine","Failed","Dropped") | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Blocked / Quarantined", Sort = 4),
  (EmailEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(ThreatTypes) and DeliveryAction == "Delivered" | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Threats Delivered", Sort = 5),
  (EmailPostDeliveryEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Post-Delivery (ZAP)", Sort = 6)
| project Metric, Value, Sort
| sort by Sort asc
content.title: Email Threat Signals

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
  (EmailEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Total Emails", Sort = 1),
  (EmailEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where EmailDirection == "Inbound" | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Inbound", Sort = 2),
  (EmailEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = dcount(SenderFromDomain) | extend Metric = "Sender Domains", Sort = 3),
  (EmailEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where UrlCount > 0 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Emails w/ URLs", Sort = 4),
  (EmailEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where AttachmentCount > 0 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Emails w/ Attachments", Sort = 5),
  (UrlClickEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Safe Links Clicks", Sort = 6)
| project Metric, Value, Sort
| sort by Sort asc
content.title: Mail Flow & Exposure

content.query:
EmailEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(ThreatTypes) or DeliveryAction in ("Blocked","Junked","Replaced") or DeliveryLocation in ("Quarantine","Junk","Failed","Dropped") or BulkComplaintLevel >= 7
| extend Verdict = case(ThreatTypes has "Malware", "Malware", ThreatTypes has "Phish", "Phish", ThreatTypes has "Spam", "Spam", DeliveryLocation == "Quarantine" or DeliveryAction == "Blocked", "Blocked/Quarantined", DeliveryAction == "Junked" or DeliveryLocation == "Junk", "Junked", BulkComplaintLevel >= 7, "Bulk", "Other")
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Verdict
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Email Threats Over Time (by Verdict)

content.query:
EmailEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(ThreatTypes) or DeliveryAction in ("Blocked","Junked","Replaced") or DeliveryLocation in ("Quarantine","Junk","Failed","Dropped") or BulkComplaintLevel >= 7
| extend Verdict = case(ThreatTypes has "Malware", "Malware", ThreatTypes has "Phish", "Phish", ThreatTypes has "Spam", "Spam", DeliveryLocation == "Quarantine" or DeliveryAction == "Blocked", "Blocked/Quarantined", DeliveryAction == "Junked" or DeliveryLocation == "Junk", "Junked", BulkComplaintLevel >= 7, "Bulk", "Other")
| summarize Count = count() by Verdict
| sort by Count desc
content.title: Threat Verdict Mix

content.query:
EmailEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(ThreatTypes) or DeliveryAction in ("Blocked","Junked","Replaced") or DeliveryLocation in ("Quarantine","Junk","Failed","Dropped") or BulkComplaintLevel >= 7
| where isnotempty(SenderFromDomain)
| summarize Threats = count() by SenderFromDomain
| top 15 by Threats desc
content.title: Top Threat Sender Domains

content.query:
EmailUrlInfo
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(UrlDomain)
| summarize Occurrences = count(), Emails = dcount(NetworkMessageId) by UrlDomain
| top 15 by Occurrences desc
content.title: Top URL Domains in Mail

content.query:
EmailEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(ThreatTypes) or DeliveryAction in ("Blocked","Junked","Replaced") or DeliveryLocation in ("Quarantine","Junk","Failed","Dropped") or BulkComplaintLevel >= 7
| extend Verdict = case(ThreatTypes has "Malware", "Malware", ThreatTypes has "Phish", "Phish", ThreatTypes has "Spam", "Spam", DeliveryLocation == "Quarantine" or DeliveryAction == "Blocked", "Blocked/Quarantined", DeliveryAction == "Junked" or DeliveryLocation == "Junk", "Junked", BulkComplaintLevel >= 7, "Bulk", "Other")
| project TimeGenerated, Verdict, SenderFromAddress, SenderFromDomain, RecipientEmailAddress, Subject, ThreatNames, DetectionMethods, DeliveryAction, DeliveryLocation, EmailActionPolicy, BulkComplaintLevel, SenderIPv4, NetworkMessageId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Filtered & Malicious Emails - Full Detail

content.query:
EmailUrlInfo
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| join kind=inner (EmailEvents | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(ThreatTypes) or DeliveryAction in ("Blocked","Junked","Replaced") or DeliveryLocation in ("Quarantine","Junk","Failed","Dropped") or BulkComplaintLevel >= 7 | project NetworkMessageId, MailThreat = ThreatTypes, SenderFromAddress, DeliveryAction) on NetworkMessageId
| summarize Hits = count(), Emails = dcount(NetworkMessageId), Senders = dcount(SenderFromAddress), Verdicts = make_set(MailThreat, 8), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Url, UrlDomain
| top 100 by Hits desc
content.title: Malicious URLs in Mail

content.query:
EmailAttachmentInfo
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Threat = iff(isnotempty(ThreatTypes), ThreatTypes, "(none)")
| summarize Emails = dcount(NetworkMessageId), Recipients = dcount(RecipientEmailAddress), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by FileName, FileType, SHA256, Threat, DetectionMethods
| top 100 by Emails desc
content.title: Email Attachments & File Hashes

content.query:
EmailPostDeliveryEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project TimeGenerated, Action, ActionType, ActionTrigger, ActionResult, ThreatTypes, RecipientEmailAddress, NetworkMessageId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Post-Delivery Remediation (ZAP)

content.query:
UrlClickEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project TimeGenerated, AccountUpn, Url, ActionType, Workload, IPAddress, IsClickedThrough, ThreatTypes, DetectionMethods
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Safe Links URL Clicks

content.json: Where your sign-ins originate worldwide. Bubble size reflects total sign-in volume per country; color intensity (green to red) reflects failed sign-ins, surfacing brute-force, password-spray, and impossible-travel hotspots at a glance. Use the detail grid below to drill into exactly which users failed, what kind of failure, how many times, and from which country.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
  (SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Total Sign-ins", Sort = 1),
  (SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ResultType != 0 | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = "Failed Sign-ins", Sort = 2),
  (SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | extend C = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion) | where isnotempty(C) | summarize Value = dcount(C) | extend Metric = "Countries Seen", Sort = 3),
  (SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ResultType != 0 | extend C = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion) | where isnotempty(C) | summarize Value = dcount(C) | extend Metric = "Countries w/ Failures", Sort = 4),
  (SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ResultType != 0 | summarize Value = dcount(UserPrincipalName) | extend Metric = "Users w/ Failures", Sort = 5)
| project Metric, Value, Sort
| sort by Sort asc
content.title: Sign-in Geography Snapshot

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Country = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
| where isnotempty(Country)
| summarize SignIns = count(), Failures = countif(ResultType != 0), Successes = countif(ResultType == 0), Users = dcount(UserPrincipalName), IPs = dcount(IPAddress) by Country
| extend FailScore = round(log10(Failures + 1), 3)
| order by SignIns desc
content.title: Sign-in Origins Worldwide - Failed Sign-ins Highlighted

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Country = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion), City = tostring(LocationDetails.city)
| where isnotempty(Country)
| summarize SignIns = count(), Failures = countif(ResultType != 0), Users = dcount(UserPrincipalName), IPs = dcount(IPAddress), RiskySignIns = countif(RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("low","medium","high")), HighRisk = countif(RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high"), CABlocks = countif(ConditionalAccessStatus == "failure"), LegacyAuth = countif(ClientAppUsed in ("Other clients","IMAP4","POP3","SMTP","MAPI","Authenticated SMTP","Exchange ActiveSync","Exchange Web Services","Exchange Online PowerShell","Autodiscover")) by Country, City
| extend FailRate = round(100.0 * Failures / SignIns, 1)
| project Country, City, SignIns, Failures, Users, IPs, RiskySignIns, HighRisk, CABlocks, LegacyAuth, FailRate
| order by Failures desc, SignIns desc
content.title: Top Origin Countries & Cities - Volume, Failures, Risk, CA Blocks & Legacy Auth

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResultType != 0
| extend Country = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion), City = tostring(LocationDetails.city)
| extend FailureType = case(isnotempty(ResultDescription), ResultDescription, strcat("ResultType ", tostring(ResultType)))
| extend RiskRank = case(RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high", 3, RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "medium", 2, RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "low", 1, 0)
| summarize Failures = count(), IPs = dcount(IPAddress), SourceIPs = make_set(IPAddress, 5), Apps = dcount(AppDisplayName), AppNames = make_set(AppDisplayName, 5), ClientApps = make_set(ClientAppUsed, 5), MaxRiskRank = max(RiskRank), CABlocks = countif(ConditionalAccessStatus == "failure"), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by User = UserPrincipalName, FailureType, City, Country
| extend MaxRisk = case(MaxRiskRank == 3, "high", MaxRiskRank == 2, "medium", MaxRiskRank == 1, "low", "none")
| project User, FailureType, City, Country, Failures, IPs, SourceIPs, Apps, AppNames, ClientApps, MaxRisk, CABlocks, FirstSeen, LastSeen
| top 200 by Failures desc
content.title: Failed Sign-ins by User - Geo, Apps, Client, Risk & Conditional Access
